Class Plane

java.lang.Object
geometries.api.Geometry
geometries.impl.Plane
public class Plane extends Geometry
Class Plane represents a plane in 3D space.

A plane is defined either by three non-collinear points or by a point and a normal vector.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Plane(Point p1, Point p2, Point p3)
    Constructor using three points on the plane.
    Plane(Point point, Vector normal)
    Constructor using a point and a normal vector.

    • getNormal

      public Vector getNormal(Point point)
      Returns the normal vector of the plane.

      Parameters:
      point - point on the plane
      Returns:
      the normalized normal vector
